title: Choose Dimension
description: this just lets you choose your dimension on joining the world for the first time!
body:
Welcome to the **Choose Dimension Mod**, where you can basically choose your dimension on joining the world or server for the first ever time!

this is compatible with both 1.21.10 and 1.21.11, expect 1.21.11 to have a bit more bugs, since it wasn't made for it.

this mod might never recieve updates except bug fixes and thats it.

i hope you like this mod!
- MaceMeta
